briefdescription.para: Feed data into the SHA-1 context.
Finalize SHA-1 and write the 20-byte digest.

memberdef.argsstring: (const SYN_HttpdRequest *req, SYN_HttpdResponse *resp, SYN_WebsocketSession *ws, void(*on_message)(const uint8_t *payload, size_t len, uint8_t opcode, void *ctx), void *ctx)
memberdef.name: syn_websocket_upgrade

param.type: void(*)(const uint8_t *payload, size_t len, uint8_t opcode, void *ctx)

briefdescription.para: Handle upgrading a connection in an httpd route handler to WebSocket.

detaileddescription.para: Performs handshake, sends 101 status, sets upgraded = true on the response.

parameterdescription.para: HTTP response interface to write upgrade headers to.
User context pointer passed through to callback.

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on successful handshake, SYN_ERROR on negotiation failure.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_WebsocketSession *ws, uint8_t opcode, const void *data, size_t len)
memberdef.name: syn_websocket_send

detaileddescription.para: Formats a WebSocket packet header and writes the payload to the socket.

parameterdescription.para: Frame type opcode (e.g., text, binary, ping).

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, or socket error code.

briefdescription.para: Background task for polling active WebSockets.
